modules.name: sub_1402B59B0
modules.claim: GameModeClass::Refresh_Local_Player_Subsystems at RVA 0x2B59B0. Walks the linked list at *(activeGameMode + 72) using +8 next pointers and terminates at the sentinel (activeGameMode + 64). For each subsystem node, reads *(node + 24) to get the subsystem pointer, calls PlayerListClass::GetCurrentPlayer (sub_140294A40) to read the new human slot, and invokes sub_1403A51E0(subsystem - 24, newPlayer) on each. This is the notification path that updates camera, HUD, selection system, and input router when the local player changes. Called by the engine's own `switch_player` console command (sub_14001FB30) immediately after Switch_Sides completes, and by SkirmishSetup (sub_1400957A0) after sub_1402924D0 in the skirmish init chain.

modules.name: sub_140294A40
modules.claim: PlayerListClass::GetCurrentPlayer at RVA 0x294A40. Companion reader to Switch_Sides. Returns vec[currentSlot] where vec is the vector<PlayerObject*> at PlayerListClass+0x00 and currentSlot is the int at PlayerListClass+0x30. Bounds-checks against the vector size before dereferencing. Returns NULL on empty-vector or out-of-range index.

modules.name: sub_1402924D0
modules.claim: PlayerListClass::Set_Current_Player_By_Faction at RVA 0x2924D0. Galactic-mode equivalent of Switch_Sides. Takes (playerList, modeType, factionPtr, playerObjOrNull). Walks the PlayerListClass internal vector looking for the slot whose *(player + 0x68) matches the given faction pointer (resolved via sub_1404AF360 if faction is provided as a descriptor), then sets playerList+0x30 = index and *(found + 0x62) = 1. CRITICAL: does NOT sweep other slots' +0x62 bytes — manual cleanup is required on top of this call to avoid multiple slots claiming LocalPlayer = 1. Called from GameModeManagerClass::Start_Game (sub_14028DBE0) inside the inverted mode-type guard `!((v-1)&~3 == 0) || v == 3`, which selects modes NOT in {1,2,4}. This is the write path for galactic conquest mode, where the 2026-04-10 B4 Switch_Sides path is silently guarded out by sub_14028AF60.

modules.name: sub_140297E80
modules.claim: PlayerListClass::Switch_Sides at RVA 0x297E80. Canonical method for rotating the human-controlled player slot. Takes a PlayerListClass* (the global at 0xA16FD0). Increments *(int*)(this + 0x30), wraps at vector end, skips players whose inner +0x10A flag is 0, sets the new slot's PlayerObject+0x62 byte to 1, iterates the entire PlayerArray and clears every other player's +0x62 byte to 0, logs 'PlayerListClass::Switch_Sides: Switched to player index %d, faction %s', then fires event 55 through the active game mode's event dispatcher at *(GameMode + 24) to notify subsystems (camera / HUD / input router). This is the SETTER path the previous session's B4 investigation could not find on disk; the CE trainer does not use it (trainer has no switch-player button), which is why read-only grep missed it.

modules.name: sub_1405819E0

Takes 1 parameter (target position-producing object). Uses sub_1403A56B0 to deduce a position from the argument, then calls sub_1403ABB80 (SetPosition) on the underlying GameObject. Only usable in tactical modes. Invoked as a method: obj:Teleport(position_or_target). Corrects the earlier Ghidra mislabel that was stored in rva_make_invulnerable_lua_ghidra (DEPRECATED).
